description: OVIOS FURNITURE is an ecommerce storefront for indoor and outdoor furniture. The site runs on Shopify and publishes agent-facing instructions for browsing products and using UCP-based commerce flows.
summary: ovios-home.com exposes public storefront HTTP endpoints for read-only browsing, a public UCP discovery document at `/.well-known/ucp`, and a documented MCP endpoint for agent-driven commerce; no developer-issued credentials or CLI/GraphQL surfaces were found.

surfaces.name: OVIOS storefront read-only product and collection endpoints
